artifacts.title: University of Chinese Academy of Sciences AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: OpenClaw official-domain discovery for the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences (UCAS) did not find a public UCAS-wide generative-AI policy. This staged bundle preserves two narrow claim candidates from an official UCAS Nanjing College Library AI academic service trial notice and rejects event, course, and profile sources as unsuitable for institution-wide policy claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No public UCAS-wide generative-AI policy was found in this run.
Claims are scoped to a UCAS Nanjing College Library trial notice and should not be treated as comprehensive UCAS institutional AI governance.
Official UCAS event reports, course catalog pages, and faculty profile pages were not generalized into university-wide policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
